description: Test cases for product-research-kickoff Skill — verifying Q&A extraction, 4-theme template filling, dual-track research spec, and parallel Task dispatch prompt generation.

evals.name: data-heavy-project-china-market
evals.prompt: 我想做个 7×24 帮我盯 A 股的 AI 助手，给程序员散户用。帮我做立项调研。
evals.expected_output: Skill should run 3-round Socratic Q&A extracting 6 skeleton variables, then fill all 4 themes (theme 2 uses data-type template), generate final prompt with dual-track spec + Task parallel dispatch + prd-writer handoff.

assertions.description: Asks 2-3 questions per round, not all 6 at once
Final draft references all 6 skeleton variables
Theme 2 uses data-type variant (coverage/frequency/compliance), not API or hardware
Output prompt includes WebSearch + muyu-search-mcp dual-track section
muyu-search-mcp planning state machine constraint explicitly written
[WebSearch] / [muyu] / [双路 ✅] / [单源 ⚠️] / [冲突 ⚠️] tag spec included
Final prompt instructs using Task tool with 4 parallel calls in single message
Output ends with handoff suggestion to prd-writer Skill

evals.name: api-driven-saas-overseas
evals.prompt: 我想做个海外市场的 AI 翻译 SaaS，集成多家翻译 API。帮我做立项调研。
evals.expected_output: Skill should extract 海外市场 + API-driven resource type. Theme 2 should use API-type template (vendor list / pricing / SLA / quota). Should note that dual-track偏重 reverses (WebSearch primary).

assertions.description: Target market identified as 海外 → WebSearch primary noted
Theme 2 uses API-type variant (price/SLA/quota), not data or hardware
Even for overseas market, muyu路 still included as cross-validation

evals.name: vague-idea-rejection
evals.expected_output: Skill must refuse to proceed to template filling. Should engage in Q&A. If user can't answer the first 2 questions concretely, suggest brainstorming first (this Skill is not the right stage).

assertions.description: Does not jump to generating research prompt from one-sentence vague idea
Starts with project definition + target market questions
If user has no answer, suggests brainstorming as upstream step

evals.name: internal-tool-no-competitor
evals.prompt: 我要给团队做个内部知识库工具，没有什么明确对标。帮我立项调研。
evals.expected_output: Skill should detect 'no competitor' as red flag for Theme 1. Should suggest replacing Theme 1 with 'user scenario research' (interview 3 target users) per 主题适用性判断 in 4-themes-template.md.

assertions.description: Identifies that theme 1 (product form) is not directly applicable
Suggests user scenario research or asks user before skipping
Does not silently skip — confirms with user first

evals.name: complete-flow-with-fill-in
evals.prompt: 我想做个浏览器扩展，自动总结 GitHub 仓库 README 给我。中国市场，对标 GitHub Copilot 的 Summary 功能。依赖 LLM API。打算用开源 fork。模块：浏览器扩展前端 / 后端总结服务 / 缓存层 / 用户配置。
evals.expected_output: Skill should recognize user already provided most of 6 variables. Should ask 1-2 clarifying questions max, then proceed to template filling. Final output is a complete parallel research prompt.

assertions.description: Does not re-ask questions user already answered
Only asks remaining gaps (e.g. confirm 4 modules are correct count)
Final output is complete copy-pasteable Task-dispatch prompt
